alpha_hypothesis: Strong candidates in old_thin were over-deferred or slot-sliced under scarce entry capacity; PIT slot-routing leadership can recover alpha without increasing global MAX_POSITIONS.
single_causal_variable: When available core slots are 0-1, allow a skipped/deferred candidate from slot_sliced or scarce_slot_breakout_deferred to replace the weakest same-day planned entry only if its PIT leadership score is higher.

h1_replay_policy.name: scarce_slot_strong_candidate_insertion
rejected_if: candidate score does not beat weakest planned score

h2_observation.name: old_thin_mfe_giveback_protection_observation_only
h2_observation.purpose: Measure loss trades that first had positive MFE, without changing late_strong or mid_weak target/exit behavior.

mid_weak.state_note: rotation-heavy bull where strategy makes money but lags indexes

old_thin.state_note: mixed-to-weak older tape with lower win rate

window.state_note: rotation-heavy bull where strategy makes money but lags indexes
mixed-to-weak older tape with lower win rate

replay_extra.h1_outcome_marker_note: Inserted candidate signals are not part of the backtester sizing multiplier whitelist, so h1_entered_trades can be zero even when the replay changed entries. h1_matched_candidate_trades_proxy matches by ticker/strategy for diagnosis only.

replay_extra.h1_outcome_marker_note: Inserted candidate signals are not part of the backtester sizing multiplier whitelist, so h1_entered_trades can be zero even when the replay changed entries. h1_matched_candidate_trades_proxy matches by ticker/strategy for diagnosis only.

acceptance_rule: old_thin EV improves, aggregate EV/PnL improves, at least 2/3 windows improve, late_strong EV does not drop more than 0.05, and mid_weak drawdown does not increase by more than 1pp.

production_impact.promotion_requirement: If accepted, move the replacement policy into a shared production helper and expose the same audit fields in run.py/backtester.py.

guardrails.why_not_repeat_old_failures: This does not test simple slot count, simple sector cap, simple rank threshold, or market-regime allowlist; it tests replacement against the weakest same-day planned entry using richer PIT signal quality fields.

rejection_reason: H1 slot-routing replay did not satisfy multi-window Gate 4; keep current production entry planning and use the audit/MFE outputs for the next mechanism search.
next_action: Do not productionize H1. Use the audit to design a stricter point-in-time displacement rule or continue with H2 observation-only exit research.
experiment_log_jsonl_note: Not appended in this run because docs/experiment_log.jsonl already has unrelated unstaged changes; the structured log and ticket are written as standalone artifacts to avoid mixing worktree ownership.
